title: From Pulcheria Augusta to Leo.

source.title: NPNF-212. Leo the Great, Gregory the Great

verses.text: (In which she expresses her assurance that Anatolius is orthodox, and begs him to assist her husband in arranging for the Synod, and announces that Flavian’s body has been buried in the Basilica of the Apostles at Constantinople and the exiled bishops restored.)
